overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a cowboy character walking through a dimly lit industrial dock or warehouse district at night. The character passes wooden warehouses, street lamps, and a horse-drawn carriage while exploring the atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock walkway beneath overhead bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the warehouse, moving deeper under the overhead bridge structure

entered.detail: large wooden industrial building with white X-bracing and red number 5 painted on the side
metal truss bridge or conveyor structure spanning across the path overhead
tall pole with bright lamp illuminating the path and building facade
black metal barred gate set into the warehouse wall
tall wooden pole supporting overhead wires running parallel to the path
red brick wall section with arched windows, continuing from the wooden structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beneath an overhead industrial bridge, passing a large wooden warehouse marked with the number 5. Warm lamplight illuminates the building facades while the night sky remains mostly obscured by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse exterior walkway with parked carriage

events.description: passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the warehouse wall, passing the parked carriage and maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with lanterns lit, parked stationary on the dirt path

entered.detail: small structure with warm light glowing from windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the brick warehouse wall, the character passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage with lit lanterns. The overhead bridge structure recedes behind as the path continues toward a distant lit building visible through the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock yard between warehouse structures

events.description: exiting the narrow warehouse corridor into an open dock area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: moving through the open yard toward the distant building, away from the main warehouse structure

entered.detail: wide unpaved yard with scattered debris and patches of grass between buildings
simple wooden post fence marking the boundary of the property
low wooden structure with glowing windows on the left side of the open area
long green-painted wooden warehouse building with multiple doors ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide dock yard with full visibility of the night sky and distant clouds. The character moves away from the main warehouse toward a green-painted warehouse structure ahead, passing a small lit building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching green warehouse with lit interior

events.description: approaching the brightly lit open doorway revealing the warehouse interior

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated open doorway of the green warehouse, preparing to enter

entered.detail: large open warehouse door emitting bright warm light from inside
stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the warehouse entrance
bright artificial light spilling out from the warehouse interior

segments.scene_description: Approaching the green warehouse, the character moves toward a brightly lit open doorway that illuminates the surrounding dirt path. Wooden barrels and crates are stacked near the entrance as the interior light grows increasingly prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit dock yard. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path beneath a heavy overhead bridge, passing a large wooden warehouse marked with the number 5 under warm lamplight. As the character continues alongside a brick wall, the overhead structure recedes and the path passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage with glowing lanterns. The environment then expands into a spacious yard under a cloudy night sky, shifting the focus away from the main warehouse toward a distant green-painted structure and a small lit building. Finally, the camera approaches the green warehouse, moving toward a brightly lit open doorway surrounded by stacked wooden barrels and crates as the interior light floods the path.
